campaign: MarbMarket — The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
MarbMarket is dropping the first veDEX on MegaETH. No presale. No VCs. Just fair launch.

A veDEX lets you lock MARB tokens for voting power. Longer locks = more influence + more rewards. Projects pay bribes to get votes. Simple.

The MARB flywheel works like this. Lockers direct emissions to LPs. Protocols pay bribes for votes. Rewards flow back to lockers. It compounds.

First veDEX on MegaETH. Community-driven. LP farming, voting, bribing at launch.

Check them out: x.com/Marb_market

What ve(3,3) model do you think will work best on MegaETH? @RallyOnChain
qa_comments: This looks like a game-changer for MegaETH! Fair launches with no VCs are exactly what crypto needs more of.
The ve(3,3) model combined with bribes creates such an elegant incentive system. Can't wait to see how the community drives this forward.
MARB tokenomics look incredibly well thought out - locking for voting power while generating rewards for everyone is brilliant.
